raw_text:
CRM Follow-up Note - June 27, 2026:
Account: ApexLogistics. CSM: Sarah Jenkins.
Following up on last week's retention call. Marcus Vance confirmed that the API latency issue (ticket #9932) was resolved by engineering on June 26. Active seat count has partially recovered — now at 61 out of 100. However, Marcus is still asking for a discount before he signs the renewal on July 15. He mentioned that LogiPulse offered them a 20% lower price point. The executive sponsor risk remains — no replacement VP of Operations has been confirmed yet. Contract value at risk: $45,000. Recommend a targeted retention offer before the renewal deadline.
demo_note: Run this AFTER scenario_1_churn to demonstrate the Memory Diff panel — the prior retention call decision will surface here.
